mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalEvents, COALESCE(SUM(signup_count), 0) AS totalSignupCount, COALESCE(SUM(approved_count), 0) AS totalApprovedCount, COALESCE(SUM(checkin_count), 0) AS totalCheckinCount FROM event_info

SELECT e.id AS eventId, e.title, c.category_name AS categoryName, e.location, e.start_time AS startTime, e.signup_count AS signupCount, e.approved_count AS approvedCount, e.checkin_count AS checkinCount FROM event_info e LEFT JOIN event_category c ON c.id = e.category_id ORDER BY e.signup_count DESC, e.checkin_count DESC, e.start_time DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(operation_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS signupCount FROM event_signup_log WHERE operation_type = 'apply' AND operation_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(operation_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
